textByHash.a48e43d2b0034bbafd8f5f4ff71bee71c280f574: Hello there! I sell plate mail bodies, are you interested?
textByHash.def2de26d38951be3d8efafd2291ff0ada0e3fa4: I'm already paying my taxes though?
textByHash.8573bf586869fdf753d795282d4e5ec1d45bddb5: Well I don't see why I have to pay for that! If the king can't afford the trip, then maybe he shouldn't be going!
textByHash.0b60b576ed440babd190dbd93cda86a612ca0995: And he's getting a mourner to tell me this? Nice try.
textByHash.8ca83409c6fd4d4b2d7de9718c83458caa4bcfdc: And he's getting a citizen to tell me this? Nice try.
